ddls:
CREATE TABLE "simulations" (
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each simulation */,
  "simulation_name" TEXT /* Name of the simulation */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the simulation was conducted */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the simulation */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the simulation */,
  "crop_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the crop variety used in the simulation */,
  "environment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the environmental conditions of the simulation */,
  "simulation_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the simulation */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the simulation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the simulation was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the simulation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the simulation was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("simulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulations_environment_id FOREIGN KEY ("environment_id") REFERENCES environments ("environment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulations_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulations_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulations_crop_id FOREIGN KEY ("crop_id") REFERENCES crops ("crop_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulations_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the location in meters */,
  "climate_zone" TEXT /* Climate zone of the location */,
  "soil_type" TEXT /* Soil type at the location */,
  "location_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the location */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the location is situated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crops" (
  "crop_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crop */,
  "crop_name" TEXT /* Name of the crop */,
  "species" TEXT /* Species of the crop */,
  "variety" TEXT /* Variety of the crop */,
  "growth_cycle" TEXT /* Growth cycle of the crop (e.g., annual, perennial) */,
  "optimal_temperature" REAL /* Optimal temperature range for the crop in degrees Celsius */,
  "optimal_precipitation" REAL /* Optimal precipitation range for the crop in millimeters */,
  "crop_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the crop */,
  "growth_cycle_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the crop's growth cycle in days */,
  "optimal_sowing_date" TEXT /* Optimal sowing date for the crop */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crop_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environments" (
  "environment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each environmental condition */,
  "temperature_range" TEXT /* Temperature range during the simulation in degrees Celsius */,
  "precipitation_range" TEXT /* Precipitation range during the simulation in millimeters */,
  "soil_moisture" REAL /* Soil moisture level during the simulation */,
  "atmospheric_co2" REAL /* Atmospheric CO2 concentration during the simulation in ppm */,
  "day_length" TEXT /* Day length during the simulation in hours */,
  "environment_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the environmental conditions */,
  "solar_radiation" REAL /* Average solar radiation during the simulation period */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Average wind speed during the simulation period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("environment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "phenology" (
  "phenology_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each phenological record */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the simulation */,
  "maturity_days_after_sowing" INTEGER /* Number of days after sowing when the crop reaches maturity */,
  "maturity_date" TEXT /* Date when the crop reaches maturity */,
  "phenological_stage" TEXT /* Phenological stage of the crop (e.g., germination, vegetative growth, reproductive growth) */,
  "stage_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the phenological stage in days */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("phenology_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_phenology_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "biomass" (
  "biomass_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each biomass record */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the simulation */,
  "above_ground_weight" REAL /* Above-ground weight of the crop in grams */,
  "below_ground_weight" REAL /* Below-ground weight of the crop in grams */,
  "total_weight" REAL /* Total weight of the crop in grams */,
  "biomass_type" TEXT /* Type of biomass measured (e.g., above-ground, below-ground) */,
  "biomass_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for biomass (e.g., grams, kilograms) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("biomass_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_biomass_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "yield_data" (
  "yield_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each yield record */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the simulation */,
  "yield" REAL /* Yield of the crop in grams per plant */,
  "harvest_index" REAL /* Harvest index of the crop (ratio of grain weight to total above-ground biomass) */,
  "yield_type" TEXT /* Type of yield measured (e.g., grain, biomass) */,
  "yield_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for yield (e.g., grams, kilograms) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("yield_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_yield_data_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed for security) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp for the user's last login */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
